# ECOS Medicare Solutions — Georgia

> Free, plain-English Medicare guidance for Georgia retirees and people approaching 65. Compare Medicare Advantage, Medicare Supplement (Medigap), and Part D drug plans with a credentialed, independent local agent at no cost. Statewide service by phone, video, and in person.

Contact: (770) 285-5174 · https://georgiamedicareenrollment.com/

## About
ECOS Medicare Solutions is an independent Medicare insurance agency serving the State of Georgia. Agent: Darin Weidauer, MBA, RSSA — gerontologist, Registered Social Security Analyst, 22-year U.S. Air Force veteran, NPN 18580338. Help is free to the consumer; independent agents are paid by carriers at enrollment.

## Verified 2026 figures
- Medicare Part B standard premium: $202.90/month; annual deductible: $283
- Part A hospital deductible: $1,736 per benefit period
- Part D out-of-pocket cap: $2,100/year; maximum deductible: $615; national base premium: $38.99
- IRMAA (income surcharge) begins above $109,000 (single) / $218,000 (joint), based on 2024 MAGI

## Compliance
We do not offer every plan available in your area. We represent 8 organizations which offer 87 products in Georgia. Beneficiaries can also contact Medicare.gov, 1-800-MEDICARE, or Georgia's SHIP (GeorgiaCares, 1-800-669-8387). Not affiliated with or endorsed by the U.S. government or the federal Medicare program. This is a solicitation for insurance.
